info.name: text-delete
info.text: You sometimes need someone to guide you.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: You can do it by yourself, but it is better with another.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: You sometimes have to step backwards and let another move forward.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: If you move together, the outside forces can guide you.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Progress is a work of art that only you can create, but others can enjoy.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Making progress can leave you simultaneously exhausted and energized.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: You can make progress by yourself, but it is easier with another.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Just as with a dance, every step you take makes progress, but you need to make them all count.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: As with any fulfilling journey, the act of making progress can be its own reward.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: You sometimes need a partner to guide you as you make progress.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: If you move together with a trusted partner, you can make progress alongside other forces that guide you like music to a dancer.
